---
title: "Jane Whorley"
---

## Jane Whorley

**Dates:** (1778-?1855)

### Description

wife of James Whorley (b.1764/5) of Otterbourne, agricultural labourer.

### Biography

She was mother of Judith (Whorley) Fielder and Susan Whorley, and probably the Jane Worley whose death was registered in Winchester in the April quarter of 1855.

### Letters

- Letter from <b>Error! Bookmark not defined</b>.OtterbournMarch 31st [1855]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
